Chat Edit: 'No need, All I need is you to have 3 things

A full text editor that is front and back end compatable (pure ASM no monaco maybe OpenGL or DirectX as the base so the frame of the IDE has structure)

Chat pane for front(user) and backend(agent/model)

A file opener for sharing files between front and back end'

Chat Edit: '.\build-dx-ide.bat

========================================
  Building Pure ASM DirectX IDE
========================================

[ERROR] NASM not found in PATH
Please install NASM from https://www.nasm.us/
Press any key to continue . . .
PS D:\professional-nasm-ide> '

========================================
  Building Pure ASM DirectX IDE
========================================

[OK] NASM command: C:\Users\HiH8e\scoop\shims\nasm.exe
NASM version 3.01 compiled on Oct 10 2025

[1/4] Assembling dx_ide_main.asm...
[OK] dx_ide_main.obj created
[2/4] Assembling file_system.asm...
[OK] file_system.obj created
[3/4] Assembling chat_pane.asm...
[OK] chat_pane.obj created
[4/4] Linking executable...

[ERROR] Linking failed
Press any key to continue . . . 
PS D:\professional-nasm-ide> '

Chat Edit: 'Next Steps
1.	Implement DirectX11 Initialization:
•	Load D3D11.dll dynamically and initialize DirectX11 components.
2.	Enhance Text Rendering:
•	Replace GDI-based rendering with DirectWrite for better performance and quality.
3.	Complete Placeholder Functions:
•	Implement HandleMouseClick, ResizeBuffers, and Cleanup.
4.	Add File Operations:
•	Implement file saving and loading functionality.
5.	Optimize Performance:
•	Use Direct2D for rendering instead of GDI for better performance.
---
Let me know if you'd like help implementing any of these features or debugging specific parts of the code!'

Chat Edit: '[2/4] Skipping separate file_system.asm (integrated into dx_ide_main.asm)
[3/4] Skipping separate chat_pane.asm (integrated into dx_ide_main.asm)

dont skip it'
